doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The EDPB does not issue "Guidance Notes" with this numbering format, the legal position contradicts established GDPR interpretation that pseudonymized data remains personal data, and no such March 2026 guidance exists in official EDPB recor
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The EDPB does not issue "Guidance Notes" with this numbering format, the legal position contradicts established GDPR interpretation that pseudonymized data remains personal data, and no such March 2026 guidance exists in official EDPB records.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The EDPB does not issue "Guidance Notes" with this numbering format, the legal position contradicts established GDPR interpretation that pseudonymized data remains personal data, and no such March 2026 guidance exists in official EDPB records.
